illustration: gauge at full or bucket overflowing

banner.description: Persistent banner warning as limit approaches

fullPage.description: Full block when limit is hit

figmaNote: Use warning-level color (amber), not error red.

designSystemIntegrations.ant: <Alert message="Daily Limit Reached" description={t('rate-limit.daily')} type="warning" showIcon />
